name: stikfix
description: Pin sticky notes on any page — your AI reads them.
author: Omer Nesher <omernesher@gmail.com>

scripts.build:host-bin: npx esbuild bin/stikfix.ts --platform=node --format=cjs --bundle "--external:node:*" --outfile=dist/host/stikfix-init.cjs && npx esbuild host/src/native-host.ts --platform=node --format=cjs --bundle "--external:node:*" --outfile=dist/host/stikfix-native.cjs
scripts.build: wxt build && tsc -p tsconfig.host.json && npm run build:host-bin
scripts.build:firefox: wxt build -b firefox && tsc -p tsconfig.host.json && npm run build:host-bin
scripts.check: tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.host.json && node scripts/clean-room-check.mjs && node scripts/host-smoke-test.mjs && npm run test:lib && npm test
